texto: So, your best defense is knowledge. It really is power, as they say...The more you know, the more easily you will develop your own philosophies about child rearing. When you have your facts straight, and when you have a parenting plan, you will be able to respond with confidence to those who are well-meaning but offering contrary or incorrect advice.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Elizabeth Pantley sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “So, your best defense is knowledge. It really is power, as they say...The more you know, the more…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, knowledge, parenting, útil em momentos de parenting.
